root_cause: Production deploy installed dependencies with npm ci --omit=dev before running the TypeScript seed script.
The seed step ignored failures with '|| echo "Seed failed, continue deploy"'.

changes.summary: Changed server dependency install from 'npm ci --omit=dev' to 'npm ci'.
Removed failure-swallowing fallback from the seed step so deploy fails if seeding fails.

verification: rg -n "Installing server dependencies|npm ci$|npx tsx prisma/seed.ts|Seed failed, continue deploy" .github/workflows/deploy.yml
